title: Expand audit-of-audit probe matrix (B1 noise, B2 cross-asset, B3 calibrator)
source: [phase5/audit_null_distribution.md](phase5/audit_null_distribution.md) §"Cells the matrix does NOT cover" — acknowledged gaps before v3.2 patch design is defensible.
why: The current 76-cell matrix covers B1 magnitude/dispersion/known-nulls, B2 synthetic close arrays, and B3 `make_folds` + `PurgedTimeSeriesSplit` layers — but leaves three gaps: (a) B1 partial-leakage with noise (mixed-signal cells at 25/50/75% leakage contamination), (b) B2 validation against real XAUUSD/XAGUSD/USDJPY close arrays not just synthetic, (c) B3 calibrator stage (`CalibratedClassifierCV.cross_val_predict`) entirely unprobed — yet this was the third layer that ultimately killed the H4 extension. Without these, any v3.2 threshold remains reverse-engineerable.
scope: extend [phase5/audit_null_distribution.py](phase5/audit_null_distribution.py) with three new families: `B1_noise_contamination` (≥25 cells), `B2_real_asset_arrays` (≥10 cells), `B3_calibrator_geometry` (≥10 cells). Re-publish [phase5/audit_null_distribution.md](phase5/audit_null_distribution.md) with the expanded surface. Deterministic harness.

history.reason: feat(phase5): close 7 tickets â€” Loop A/H4 infra hardening + reporting
